West Africa

Senegal Travel Guide

Best for travelers who want music, art, Atlantic history, and a francophone city-and-coast route.

General information about Senegal

Senegal offers one of the region’s most polished cultural travel experiences, balancing Dakar’s urban energy with coastal heritage and softer delta landscapes.

Getting around

Dakar anchors most itineraries, with onward day trips or short road journeys to Gorée, Sine-Saloum, Saint-Louis, and Petite Côte.

Best time to visit

November to March is the strongest period for climate comfort, birdlife, and general road conditions.

Planning notes

Use this country page to compare attractions, understand how to move between them, and decide whether the trip works best as a standalone route or part of a broader regional circuit.
